basic_details.job_title: PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 147 Clerk, Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Manager, Deputy Manager, Executive, Senior Officer, Junior Officer, Clerk
basic_details.short_information: The table below gives a quick snapshot of the key facts of PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 - organisation name, total posts, vacancies, application dates and selection process - for candidates who want the highlights at a glance.

application_fee.details: This section covers exactly how much candidates need to pay and how the fee should be submitted while applying for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026. | Application fee is ₹1000/- per post for all categories of candidates. The fee must be paid online through UPI QR Code on the application portal. The fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. Candidates must save the fee payment confirmation/receipt for future reference. Candidates applying for more than one post must pay the fee separately for each post applied to.

age_limit.details: Age limits for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 differ widely by post, reflecting the seniority of each role, and will be calculated as on 1 July 2026. | *Age relaxation in the upper age limit applies only as an exception for exceptionally capable and experienced candidates. There is no relaxation in the minimum age requirement for any post. | Also Read: Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out

qualification.details: Eligibility for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 is built on two pillars - educational qualification and relevant banking experience - and both vary by post. The details below help candidates check which post they qualify for before applying. | A graduate degree from a recognised university is the essential minimum requirement for every post in this recruitment; higher qualifications and professional certifications are preferred for managerial roles. | Candidates without a computer background must hold a Basic Computer Course certificate, or complete the relevant course within six months of joining the bank, to remain eligible for appointment. | Importantly, the notification specifies that all educational qualifications must be completed within the minimum course duration declared by the respective university or board. Candidates who took extra semesters or years to clear a backlog or ATKT are not eligible to apply for any of these posts. | Relevant prior experience in a cooperative or commercial bank is mandatory for all posts except Clerk. The table below summarises the minimum experience needed for each post.

selection_process: Selection for all posts under PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 follows a two-stage process
with candidates applying to multiple posts required to clear a separate exam for each.

Written Examination for candidates who meet the eligibility criteria. Interview for candidates shortlisted from the written examination. Candidates applying for more than one post will be required to appear for a separate written examination for each post. Final selection is based on combined performance in the written examination and interview

physical_eligibility.details: Competition for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 will vary sharply by post, mainly due to the difference in vacancy count and the experience criteria attached to each role. | The Clerk post, with 100 vacancies and no prior experience requirement, is open to all fresh graduates meeting the 55% marks criterion and is expected to draw the highest volume of applications among all nine posts. The Junior Officer post, with 30 vacancies, also has a wide vacancy spread but is restricted to candidates with at least 3 years of relevant front-line banking experience, which narrows the applicant pool compared to Clerk. At the other end, posts such as General Manager (1 vacancy), Assistant General Manager (2), and Manager (2) demand 3 to 8+ years of managerial-level cooperative or commercial banking experience, which limits the eligible pool to seasoned banking professionals - even though the absolute number of applicants will be lower, competition per seat remains intense given how few vacancies are available at the senior level.

how_to_apply: The application process for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Follow these steps to submit your application correctly:
Visit the official career portal at https://pdc.bank.in/career or the application portal at https://pdc.ugrowhrservices.com.
Read the official notification carefully and identify the post(s) you are eligible for.
Fill in the digital application form with accurate personal, educational and experience details.
Upload all required documents as specified in the notification.
Pay the application fee of ₹1000/- per post using the UPI QR Code provided on the portal.
Save and download the fee payment confirmation for future reference.
Submit the application before the deadline of 28 June 2026 and keep a copy/screenshot of the submitted form.
important_instructions: Candidates should keep the following official conditions in mind before and after applying:

The probation period for all cadres is 1 year from the date of joining the bank, and may be extended if required. All correspondence regarding examinations and interviews will be sent only through email - no other mode of communication will be used. Candidates must bear their own travel and boarding expenses to attend the written examination and interview venue. The bank reserves all rights related to the recruitment process without being required to give any reason. The bank has an unrestricted right to extend the last date for submission of applications.

faq.question: Q1. What is PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 is the recruitment drive announced by the Panchmahal District Co-operative Bank Limited on 13 June 2026 for 147 vacancies across nine posts, including General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Manager, Deputy Manager, Executive, Senior Officer, Junior Officer and Clerk.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 147 vacancies. The Clerk post carries the highest share with 100 vacancies, followed by 30 vacancies for Junior Officer, with the remaining seven posts together accounting for 17 vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window opened on 14 June 2026 and closes on 28 June 2026 at midnight. Candidates should apply well before the deadline, as the bank reserves the right to extend this date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1000 per post, payable online through UPI QR Code. The fee is non-refundable, and candidates applying for more than one post must pay the fee separately for each post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age limits vary by post, ranging from 20–30 years for Clerk (no relaxation) to 35–51 years for General Manager. Age for all posts will be calculated as on 1 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A graduate degree in any subject from a recognised university is the essential qualification for all nine posts. Clerk applicants additionally need a minimum of 55% marks in graduation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a written examination for eligible candidates, followed by an interview for those shortlisted. Candidates applying for multiple posts must appear for a separate written exam for each post.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through https://pdc.bank.in/career or https://pdc.ugrowhrservices.com by filling the digital application form, uploading the required documents, and paying the ₹1000 fee via UPI QR Code before 28 June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation in PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age relaxation on the upper age limit is allowed only as an exception for exceptionally capable and experienced candidates. There is no relaxation in the minimum age requirement for any post, including Clerk.

faq.question: Q10. Is computer knowledge mandatory for the Clerk post in PDC Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates without a computer background must hold a Basic Computer Course certificate, or complete the relevant course within six months of joining the bank, to be eligible for continued appointment to the Clerk post.
